response.justification: Despite extensive software experience, the candidate is a senior-level engineer with no clear entry-level trajectory, lacks proficiency in German (only 'basic'), and has minimal Java experience despite the role requiring Java proficiency and insurance-sector agile projects — their work is dominated by TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with Java appearing only as a minor, outdated footnote.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong track record in open-source contributions and technical workshops
Demonstrated expertise in agile practices, CI/CD, and test-driven development
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, failing the core requirement
Primary tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, with negligible recent Java experience
Senior-level background makes them overqualified and misaligned with entry-level role expectations
